segments.beat: hands hold device face-up in natural light, transparent shell clearly visible, PCB readable through resin
device rotated slowly, showing side profile and button layout; see-through display active with lit pixels
grip shifts to thumbs-on-controls position, D-pad and A/B buttons engaged, active gameplay posture
camera pulls slightly wider, device held out palm-up showing full footprint against indoor background
close low-angle view of device resting on palm, green plant background, display lit, collectible presentation angle

demonstrates.motion_value: high — rotation exposes PCB through shell continuously
high — lit pixels visible throughout rotation and hold sequences
medium — two-thumb grip and palm hold confirm sub-palm footprint
medium — thumbs-on-controls posture implies gaming but no gameplay footage
medium — deliberate low-angle presentation with plant backdrop reads as object photography
medium — resin clarity and finish visible but no extreme macro

selection_note: Continuous rotation + active display through all 17s makes this the strongest transparency+display proof clip in the set; loops cleanly from open hold back to rotation.

aesthetics.weakness: cluttered background (chairs, plants, shelving) competes with subject in almost every frame
aesthetics.note: handheld POV, flat ambient light, no depth-of-field separation - needs controlled environment
